report_name: OpenAI Launches 'Daybreak' to Automate Vulnerability Hunting with AI

tools.name: Daybreak
tools.description: A cybersecurity platform launched by OpenAI that uses AI models to automatically find, validate, and remediate software vulnerabilities.

tools.name: GPT-5.5-Cyber
tools.description: An advanced, specialized AI model from OpenAI used within the Daybreak platform to discover vulnerabilities and generate exploits.

tools.name: Codex Security
tools.description: A tool that powers the Daybreak system by building an editable threat model from a code repository for continuous monitoring.

tools.name: Project Glasswing
tools.description: An AI-powered cyber defense platform from Anthropic, mentioned as a competitor to OpenAI's Daybreak.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: The AI company that launched the 'Daybreak' cybersecurity initiative.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: A rival AI lab to OpenAI and creator of the 'Project Glasswing' cyber defense platform.

identities.name: Cloudflare
identities.description: A security vendor partnered with OpenAI for its Daybreak initiative.
